query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total
FROM orders 
WHERE notes LIKE '%给老师%' 
   OR notes LIKE '%给瑶瑶%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给嘟嘟%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给姜一%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给云云%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给声声%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给皮皮%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给安雅%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给苏苏%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给嫩嫩%'
   OR notes LIKE '%绘老师%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total
FROM orders 
WHERE notes LIKE '%给老师%' 
   OR notes LIKE '%给瑶瑶%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给嘟嘟%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给姜一%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给云云%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给声声%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给皮皮%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给安雅%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给苏苏%'
   OR notes LIKE '%给嫩嫩%'
